chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No.S-595 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Fresh Case 1. For orders on CMA No.4849/2025 (If granted). 2. For orders on office objection No.1 to 6 & reply of counsel thereof as flag “A”. 3. For orders on CMA No.4850/2025 (Exemption). 4. For hearing of main case..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 22.07.2025 Mr. Fazil Rind, Advocate for the petitioners a/w petitioners..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. 1. Urgency granted. 2to4. The petitioners through instant petition have prayed for the following relief:- (a) To direct the official respondents to provide necessary legal protection to the petitioners and their well wishers according to law. (b) To direct the private respondents not to harass and threaten the petitioners, and well wishers, family members and relatives of petitioner No.2, and in this regard the private respondents may be directed to file, execute, sworn an undertaking/ affidavit that they will not harass, threaten and cause any kind of loss/ damage to the petitioners, and will not implicate the petitioner No.2, his family members, relatives and well wishers in false cases in future. It is the case of the petitioners that they have contracted marriage of free will which has annoyed their parents and they have been declared karo kari. Per record annexed with the petition the marriage between the petitioners was solemnized on 21.08.2024 and no any FIR has been lodged against them. The petitioner No.1, as per medical record, appears to be under pre-natal care and the counsel for the petitioner submits that she will not be able to appear before this Court on next date and he submits that he would be satisfied if petition is granted and the official respondents are directed to protect the lives of the petitioners in accordance with law.

Per record annexed with the petition the marriage between the petitioners was solemnized on 21.08.2024 and no any FIR has been lodged against them. The petitioner No.1, as per medical record, appears to be under pre-natal care and the counsel for the petitioner submits that she will not be able to appear before this Court on next date and he submits that he would be satisfied if petition is granted and the official respondents are directed to protect the lives of the petitioners in accordance with law. Mr. K.A. Vaswani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh, present in Court in some other cases, waives notice of this petition and after 2 perusing its contents renders no objection for disposal of this petition. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of with direction to the respondents No.2 to 5 to ensure that no harassment is caused to the petitioners and they are provided protection as and when required. The petition stands disposed of along with listed application(s). JUDGE Ayaz Gul
